name: chrXq11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome X q-arm pericentric flank (Xq11.1-Xq11.2), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Alpha-satellite (DXZ1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Distally adjoins the AR (androgen receptor) locus. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR (DXZ1) + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline.
